full_suite_observation.reason: The unqualified worktree-wide run includes known missing governed assets, pre-existing governing-source drift, and subprocess import-path failures. Scoped implementation, tracker, registry, drafting, and fusion clusters pass.

authority_boundary: This evidence changes project source registration only. Provenance, licensing, integrity, annotation, technical QA, mask truth, and release authority remain independently enforced.
